title: polycephalium capitatum
intro: Polycephalium capitatum, also known as the desert polypore or red-banded polypore, is a species of fungus belonging to the family Meruliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Polycephalium capitatum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions such as eczema. Herbal preparations of Polycephalium capitatum can be found in the form of tinctures, extracts, and salves, which are often used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
